title: mentha × carinthiaca
intro: Mentha × carinthiaca, also known as Bergamot Mint, is a hybrid of peppermint and spearmint. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to alleviate digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and act as an antispasmodic. The health benefits of Bergamot Mint include its potential to alleviate symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome (IBS), relieve nausea and headaches, and even support oral health. Bergamot Mint can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in aromatherapy for its calming and refreshing properties.
